details.theme: Global supply-chain disruption from tariffs and trade friction
details.why_it_matters: Rising US tariffs and trade barriers are disrupting industrial input costs and logistics networks, which can affect refining margins, shipping demand, and downstream energy-intensive manufacturing.
example_headlines: The Aluminum Shock Hitting the Global Economy — The global aluminum market is being squeezed by two powerful forces at once: conflict in the Middle East and rising US tariffs
EU frets as China builds an industrial base in Morocco — Billions of dollars of investment raise concerns that subsidised goods could swamp European manufacturers

details.theme: ECB inflation concerns and energy price pass-through
details.why_it_matters: Central bank concern about unanchored inflation from energy shocks could drive tighter monetary policy, affecting global demand and oil prices through economic growth channels.
example_headlines: ECB's Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War — The European Central Bank can no longer look through the inflationary impact of the war in Iran as price pressures spread beyond energy
Jay Powell warns Federal Reserve is undergoing 'stress test'

details.theme: US refinery utilization surge
details.why_it_matters: High refinery run rates and deferred maintenance reduce crude demand flexibility and could tighten margins if maintenance backlogs create sudden capacity drops.
example_headlines: US Crude Refiners Are Pushing Run Rates to Maximum Levels

details.theme: Venezuela power crisis affecting oil operations
details.why_it_matters: Energy companies forced to self-supply power for oil/gas projects signals deteriorating infrastructure that could constrain production capacity and exports.
example_headlines: Venezuela Wants Oil Firms to Supply Their Own Power for Projects

details.theme: Ukraine strikes on Russian oil infrastructure
details.why_it_matters: Direct attacks on Russian oil terminals and refining capacity reduce global supply and can disrupt export flows from major producer.
example_headlines: Ukraine strikes St Petersburg as Putin's forum gets under way — Kyiv hits oil terminal after deadly Russian strikes on Ukrainian cities

details.theme: Asian energy resilience concerns
details.why_it_matters: Asean explicitly flagging energy security as a priority amid Middle East disruptions could drive regional demand shifts and hedging behavior that affects global oil flows and pricing.

details.theme: Asian inflation and central bank tightening
details.why_it_matters: Rising oil prices are driving inflation in Asia, forcing central banks toward rate hikes that could dampen economic growth and reduce oil demand in a key consumption region.
example_headlines: Philippine CPI Slows to 6.8% as Transport Cost Pressures Ease
India Rate-Hike Bets Build as Pricey Oil, Weak Rupee Stoke Inflation Risks

details.theme: Global shipping route congestion and cost inflation
details.why_it_matters: Container rate spikes driven by port congestion and fuel costs are raising logistics expenses that could feed into refined product pricing and demand destruction.
example_headlines: Asia-to-US Container Rates Spike 109% Since Iran War Started
Oil tanker owners fear market crash after Iran war drove record profits

details.theme: Tanker fleet overcapacity and rate collapse risk
details.why_it_matters: Shipowners' recent vessel investments during high-rate periods create structural oversupply risk; a sudden rate collapse could signal weakening crude transport demand or route normalization.
example_headlines: Oil tanker owners fear market crash after Iran war drove record profits

details.theme: Jet fuel demand surge and refinery incentives
details.why_it_matters: Rising jet fuel costs are incentivizing refineries to increase production, which affects crude oil demand and refinery utilization rates as a new driver of oil consumption.
example_headlines: Etihad to surpass pre-Iran war capacity without price cuts
IATA Director Willie Walsh on Rising Cost of Jet Fuel

details.theme: Aviation fuel demand recovery
details.why_it_matters: Airlines signaling improved fuel cost environment and industry recovery could drive jet fuel demand and refinery utilization rates.
example_headlines: Etihad Airways CEO Antonoaldo Neves on Fuel Prices — 'things are coming back'
United Airlines CEO Discusses Industry Challenges — At The International Air Transport Association

details.theme: Asia coal supply tightening
details.why_it_matters: Rising coal prices and supply constraints in Asia can shift energy demand toward oil as a substitute fuel for power generation and industrial use, increasing crude demand in the region.
example_headlines: Asia Coal Prices Rise to 22-Month High on Indonesia Export Rules

details.theme: Supertanker fleet expansion
details.why_it_matters: Record orders for new oil supertankers signal expectations of sustained long-distance crude flows, potentially indicating anticipated supply disruptions or route changes that require larger carrying capacity.
example_headlines: Giant Oil Supertanker Orders Eclipse Record Set in 2008

details.theme: Asian energy demand surge and LNG restocking
details.why_it_matters: Hotter weather in Asia and European restocking are driving LNG prices to multi-year highs, which can shift global energy mix and compete with oil for heating/power generation demand.
example_headlines: Morgan Stanley Sees LNG Upside Risks as Asian Demand Picks Up
Nifty Swings Rise as War Risk Unnerves India Stock Bulls — Geopolitics, costlier energy and uncertainty over global growth are weighing on sentiment

details.theme: Canadian airline fuel cost crisis and supply chain stress
details.why_it_matters: Jet fuel cost pressures on North American carriers signal sustained elevated fuel prices and potential logistics constraints affecting regional energy markets.
example_headlines: WestJet Slams Canada's Loan Offer to Airlines Hit by Fuel Costs — WestJet Airlines Ltd. condemned the Canadian government's offer of loans to help carriers hit by high jet fuel costs in the wake of the closing of the Strait of

details.theme: Fuel subsidy cost pressures in oil-importing nations
details.why_it_matters: Rising crude prices from Middle East tensions are forcing oil-importing governments to increase fuel subsidy spending, which may force fiscal retrenchment or subsidy cuts that could dampen demand.
example_headlines: Malaysia Minister on Fuel Subsidy, Deficit Goals — Malaysia may not meet its fiscal deficit targets for 2026 as the Iran war drives up the cost of fuel subsidies

details.theme: Asia coal substitution for oil
details.why_it_matters: Energy-starved Asian countries shifting from oil to coal signals reduced oil demand in a major consumption region, potentially pressuring prices.
example_headlines: Oil Crunch Is Stoking Asia's Demand for Coal, Shipping CEO Says

details.theme: US inflation spike from Middle East energy shock
details.why_it_matters: Inflation jump to 4.2% attributed to Middle East energy disruption suggests sustained oil price elevation is feeding into broader economy, affecting demand elasticity.
example_headlines: US inflation jumped to 4.2% in May amid Middle East energy shock

details.theme: Asian chip sector demand surge
details.why_it_matters: Renewed investment in semiconductor manufacturing across South Korea and Japan could drive incremental petrochemical feedstock demand and refinery utilization in Asia.
example_headlines: Korean Stocks Surge as Iran Deal Hopes Spark Chip Stock Rally
Japan's Stocks Gain as Trump's Iran Deal Comments Lift Sentiment

details.theme: Chinese coal-to-chemicals expansion
details.why_it_matters: Large-scale shift toward coal-based chemical production in China could reduce crude oil demand for petrochemical feedstocks and alter regional refining economics.
example_headlines: Chinese Region Pushes Coal Chemicals as Energy Security Fix
